reason: This is a traditional religious poem praising Prophet Muhammad and asking for blessings upon him. It contains no extremist content or violent rhetoric.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: جَلَّ الذي بعث الرسول رحيما ليصُدَّ عنا يوم الحساب جحيما فيا أيها الراجون منه شفاعةً ًصلوا عليه وسلموا تسليما ﷺ
